title: Magical Realism
html: Stub. Genre-frame Yahir absorbed via One Hundred Years of Solitude in early 2022 (see 2022 03 11 made people vote to prove voting is a farce only effective t reading notes). Treats the literal-impossible (Remedios's pheromonal animal-effect, the 4-year rain, the pig-tailed baby) as ordinary, with no narrative apology. Adjacent to lineage as fate and cyclical time in Yahir's literary vocabulary.

related.label: One Hundred Years of Solitude — Yahir's chapter-by-chapter reading notes (chs 7–20)
